changes: Circle of Scorn: Potency increased from 120 to 140.
Requiescat: Potency increased from 300 to 320; Potency while under the effect of Requiescat increased from 900 to 920.
Blade of Faith: Potency increased from 200 to 220; Potency while under the effect of Requiescat increased from 700 to 720.
Blade of Truth: Potency increased from 300 to 320; Potency while under the effect of Requiescat increased from 800 to 820.
Blade of Valor: Potency increased from 400 to 420; Potency while under the effect of Requiescat increased from 900 to 920.
Lemure's Slice: Potency increased from 220 to 240.
Empyreal Arrow: Potency increased from 230 to 240.
Contre Sixte: Potency increased from 360 to 380.
Jolt II: Potency increased from 310 to 320.
Enchanted Reprise: Potency increased from 330 to 340.

new_content.name: Thaleia
new_content.description: The third installment of Myths of the Realm; an alliance raid dungeon.

new_content.name: The Heart of the Myth
new_content.description: New Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Island Sanctuary
new_content.description: Expanded with new rank cap, gathering areas, buildings, and the 'felicitous favors' system.

new_content.name: Subaquatic Voyages
new_content.description: System updated with new areas and increased maximum submersible rank.

new_content.name: Crystalline Conflict
new_content.description: PvP system updated with new progress gauge UI elements and visual indicators.

housing.name: Fern Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall delicately stenciled with a cascading leafy design.

housing.name: Greige Carpet
housing.description: For the ambivalent designer who cannot commit to grey or beige. Guaranteed unremarkable!

housing.name: Seabed Ceiling Lamp
housing.description: Simply install this light fixture to be immersed in the magic of the deep. Unsettling fish sold separately by popular request.

housing.name: Mobile Garden Stairs
housing.description: The portability and convenience of this full flight of stairs ultimately render the age-old argument of "ladder versus stepladder" moot.

housing.name: Flower-wreathed Gazebo
housing.description: A charming and romantic pavilion for all those without allergies.

housing.name: Elpis Garden Fountain
housing.description: A serene decoration fashioned after those thought to exist in ancient times.

housing.name: Wildflower Bed
housing.description: A vibrant patch of various wild-growing flora.

housing.name: Minute Mindflayer Sprinkler
housing.description: Rest assured that this inanimate baby monster will spray you with water instead of the blood of its enemies.

housing.name: Magazine Display Rack
housing.description: An easily perusable collection of popular periodicals and other publications.

housing.name: Throne of the Foremost
housing.description: This artifact recovered from the Fell Court of Troia has the distinct air of a furnishing designed for only the greatest of individuals, but technically nothing can stop you from sitting on it.

housing.name: Celestial Screen
housing.description: This rounded screen designed to resemble the heavens above is a must-have for astrologians, astrologists, astronomers, and whoever decides to prefix their vocation with "astro" next.

housing.name: Portaled Partition
housing.description: This partition features a quaint circular opening certain to invite the sort of guest who is keen on breakfast.

housing.name: Classic Secretaire
housing.description: An elegant desk perfect for penning what the less dignified might consider an excessive amount of missives.

housing.name: Ronkan Fireplace
housing.description: A solid stone hearth rendered in the Ronkan architectural style.

housing.name: Storm Trophy (Left)
housing.description: A sensibly sized monument to Limsa Lominsa's Grand Company, the Maelstrom. One of three independent pieces.

housing.name: Storm Trophy (Center)
housing.description: A sensibly sized monument to Limsa Lominsa's Grand Company, the Maelstrom. One of three independent pieces.

housing.name: Storm Trophy (Right)
housing.description: A sensibly sized monument to Limsa Lominsa's Grand Company, the Maelstrom. One of three independent pieces.

housing.name: Serpent Trophy (Left)
housing.description: A sensibly sized monument to Gridania's Grand Company, the Order of the Twin Adder. One of three independent pieces.

housing.name: Serpent Trophy (Center)
housing.description: A sensibly sized monument to Gridania's Grand Company, the Order of the Twin Adder. One of three independent pieces.

housing.name: Serpent Trophy (Right)
housing.description: A sensibly sized monument to Gridania's Grand Company, the Order of the Twin Adder. One of three independent pieces.

housing.name: Flame Trophy (Left)
housing.description: A sensibly sized monument to Ul'dah's Grand Company, the Immortal Flames. One of three independent pieces.

housing.name: Flame Trophy (Center)
housing.description: A sensibly sized monument to Ul'dah's Grand Company, the Immortal Flames. One of three independent pieces.

housing.name: Flame Trophy (Right)
housing.description: A sensibly sized monument to Ul'dah's Grand Company, the Immortal Flames. One of three independent pieces.

housing.name: Sealing Wax & Letter Set
housing.description: When one pens a missive upon stationery of this caliber, coherency is optional.

housing.name: Manderville's Adventurer Flakes
housing.description: Manderville & Manderville's lovingly crafted Manderville's Adventurer Flakes (Manderville Mark Certified) supplement the diets of growing adventurers with the nutrients they need, while providing the convenience and non-perishability they crave. Now with flavor!

housing.name: Cluster Lamp
housing.description: This artificial crystal formation produces a gentle glow certain to give heart to longtime adventurers.

housing.name: Bubbly Mogfloat
housing.description: A tall glass of pom fizz topped with a heaping scoop of frosty ice cream.

housing.name: Blighted Earth Sword Stand
housing.description: Cloaked in loam and enough ominous power to make the land tremble, this greatsword evokes memories of a fallen despot.

housing.name: Abyssal Wings Display
housing.description: A sculpture incorporating several of Zeromus's key features, the power to destroy life as we know it thankfully not among them.

housing.name: Hanging Lure Display
housing.description: An aesthetic arrangement of angling accoutrements.

housing.name: Lapis Manalis Banner
housing.description: A fraying banner emblazoned with the symbol of the reapers.

housing.name: Wood Slice Loft
housing.description: This whimsical loft was hewn from a centuries-old tree.

housing.name: Faerie Pendant Wall Light
housing.description: No pixies were harmed in the making of these whimsical floral lights, and thus none will be lurking in wait to exact revenge during your next visit to Il Mheg. For this, anyway.

housing.name: The Builder
housing.description: A heavenly portrait of Byregot, god of architecture and industry.

housing.name: The Destroyer
housing.description: A heavenly portrait of Rhalgr, god of destruction.

housing.name: The Warden
housing.description: A heavenly portrait of Azeyma, keeper of the sun and goddess of inquiry.

housing.name: The Traders
housing.description: A heavenly portrait of Nald'thal, overseer of the underworld and god of commerce.

housing.name: The Matron
housing.description: A heavenly portrait of Nophica, tender of soils and harvests and goddess of abundance.

housing.name: The Keeper
housing.description: A heavenly portrait of Althyk, surveyor of change and space and god of time.

housing.name: Crystarium Wall Canopy
housing.description: An elegant fixture reminiscent of Crystarium sensibilities.

housing.name: Colossal Chronometer Window
housing.description: A looming reminder of the inexorable march of time.

housing.name: Alzadaal's Treasure Rug
housing.description: This beautiful replication of the cloth draped across the bounties of Alzadaal's Legacy will remind you of all the coin you yet stand to gain.

housing.name: Imitation Trapdoor
housing.description: All of the excitement of a true trapdoor, with none of the deadly pits below.

housing.name: Field of Hope Rug
housing.description: Walk free, and bear the light for others to follow.
